_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 expression profiling in IDH-wildtype glioblastoma: genomic associations and survival outcomes.

_contextSnippet: The iNF-07E antibody was immunoreactive in 46 tumors (76%). Fourteen (23%) demonstrated minimal or absent immunostaining... Inter-core heterogeneity was minimal
details: Immunoreactive in 46 tumors (76%), minimal or absent staining in 14 (23%), with minimal inter-core heterogeneity
